textByHash.0efe0fc1b73a637480437f4d64fca6cb998c1f02: Oh my. I'll never find my way back before Khazard's men come and hunt me down.
textByHash.1a0255b2665be4a466bfd37c6374e469f1ce820f: Oh my, oh my, the village has been pillaged and I'm still lost. Oh dear.
textByHash.76f9fa557a671ba290d6135d86846e3042f15962: Hello. I hope they come out and find me soon. It's getting cold.
textByHash.a6f25b26747b32af286369355c551685c22a99f3: Gotta find a way out. We built this maze for protection but I can't get used to it. I'm always getting lost.
textByHash.8127e36a4ebdb13e432601272f21a7cbc2095584: Are you trying to be funny?
